MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFs JOHN O'REILLY, and JULIA O'REILLY's Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. 128.7 Against Defendant Statcomm, Inc. And Its Attorneys Of Records.

Plaintiffs John O'Reilly and Julia Hulya Ozlem O'Reilly's Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To C.C.P. 128.7 Against Defendant Statcomm, Inc. And Its Attorneys Of Record is DENIED.

Moving Parties' motion was neither timely filed nor timely served. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 1005(b); Code of Civil Procedure section 1013(a) [service by mail to place outside State adds ten court days to "any period of notice"].) see also Code of Civil Procedure section 1010.6(a)(3)(B) [service by email adds two court days to "any period of notice"].)

Moreover, the challenged pleading has been withdrawn. On this record, the court declines to exercise discretion in favor of ordering sanctions.

Order is signed.
